title: Phœbadius the bishop.

source.title: NPNF2-03. Theodoret, Jerome, Gennadius, & Rufinus: Historical Writings

verses.text: Phoebadius, bishop of Agen, in Gaul, published a book Against the Arians.
There are said to be other works by him, which I have not yet read.
He is still living, infirm with age.
